EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} removed virtual machine "{object.value}" from virtual machine pool "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} is removing virtual machine pool "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to remove virtual machine pool "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to change virtual machine pool "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to remove virtual machine "{object.value}" from virtual machine pool "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed virtual machine pool "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create virtual machine pool "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added virtual machine "{object.value}" to virtual machine pool "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to add virtual machine "{object.value}" to virtual machine pool "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed virtual machine pool "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created virtual machine pool "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
